name: multi_turn
description: Tests conversation continuity across multiple turns: context retention, topic switching, drill-down

tests.description: Bot retains context from previous turn (Jacobo details)
tests.input: What AI model does it use?

conversation.content: Tell me about the Jacobo agent
Jacobo is my omnichannel AI agent for customer service. It works via WhatsApp and web, with specialized sub-agents that handle quotes, appointments, and orders using tool calling.
What AI model does it use?

tests.description: Bot handles topic switch from Jacobo to Business OS
tests.input: And the Business OS, what is it?

conversation.content: Jacobo is my omnichannel AI agent for customer service. I built it for Santifer iRepair.
And the Business OS, what is it?

tests.description: Bot provides deeper detail on progressive drill-down
tests.input: How exactly does the SEO pipeline work?

conversation.content: I've built several systems: an AI agent called Jacobo, a Business OS with 12 bases in Airtable, a programmatic website with automated SEO, and this portfolio with chatbot and RAG.
Tell me more about the programmatic SEO
I built a programmatic SEO architecture to automatically generate indexable pages using a decision engine that evaluates search volume and competition.
How exactly does the SEO pipeline work?

tests.description: Bot doesn't repeat the same formulation across turns
tests.input: And what else can you tell me?

conversation.content: What experience do you have with AI?
I've been building AI systems in production for over 2 years. From Jacobo, an omnichannel agent, to RAG pipelines and automated evals.
And what else can you tell me?

assertions.criteria: The response should provide NEW information not already mentioned in the previous assistant message. It should NOT simply restate the same points about Jacobo being omnichannel or mentioning RAG/evals in the same way.

tests.description: Bot returns to previous topic correctly
tests.input: Going back to Jacobo, how many customers does it serve?

conversation.content: Jacobo is my omnichannel AI agent for customer service, it works via WhatsApp and web.
My main stack is React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, and for AI I use Claude from Anthropic with RAG on Supabase.
Going back to Jacobo, how many customers does it serve?
